model_specification_line: smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + daca_eligible:post + age + I(age ** 2) + sex_female + C(statefip) + C(year) + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES + LFPR + UNEMP", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": sample["statefip"]})
sample_selection: merge on statefip and year to policy_labor_market_data.csv
